Who We Serve Case Studies About Us Contact

Estate & Legacy Planning

Protect and transfer your wealth to future generations efficiently.

Your Legacy Matters

Estate planning isn't just for the wealthy. It's about making sure your assets go where you want, when you want, with minimal taxes and hassle.

40%
More Preserved

Tax-Efficient Transfer

Proper planning can preserve significantly more wealth for your heirs compared to no planning.

Avoid
Common Mistakes

Probate Prevention

Proper estate planning can help your family avoid costly and time-consuming probate proceedings.

Peace
Of Mind

Family Protection

Knowing your family is protected and your wishes documented provides invaluable peace of mind.

Estate Planning Services

Coordination

Attorney Coordination

We work with estate planning attorneys to ensure your financial plan aligns with your legal documents. We help you identify what documents you need and coordinate the implementation.

  • Will and trust review
  • Power of attorney documents
  • Healthcare directives
  • Trust funding coordination
Strategy

Beneficiary Planning

Beneficiary designations often override wills. We review all designations to ensure they match your estate plan and maximize tax efficiency.

  • IRA and 401(k) beneficiaries
  • Life insurance beneficiaries
  • Transfer-on-death accounts
  • Trust as beneficiary analysis
Tax Planning

Tax-Efficient Transfers

Strategies to minimize estate and income taxes when transferring wealth to beneficiaries.

  • Roth conversion for inheritance
  • Stepped-up basis planning
  • Annual gifting strategies
  • Charitable remainder trusts
Protection

Asset Protection

Safeguard your wealth from creditors, lawsuits, and other risks while maintaining access and control.

  • Trust structures
  • Insurance analysis
  • Business succession planning
  • Long-term care planning

Charitable Giving Strategies

Qualified Charitable Distributions

Donate directly from your IRA to charity after age 70 1/2. Satisfies RMDs without increasing taxable income.

Donor-Advised Funds

Front-load charitable deductions in high-income years while distributing gifts over time to your chosen charities.

Appreciated Asset Donations

Donate appreciated securities to avoid capital gains taxes while receiving a full fair-market-value deduction.

Protect Your Family's Future

Start your estate and legacy planning conversation today.
